revision.comment: Bot: mark 4 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24644718927|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:瓢箪塚古墳]]
'''Hyōtan-tsuka Kofun''' (瓢箪塚古墳) or '''Hisago-tsuka Kofun''' (瓢箪塚古墳) is a name commonly used for [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) across Japan. The name is derived from the resemblance of {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} (keyhole-shaped Kofuns) to a {{ill|gourd|en|gourd|qid=Q5339237|lt=gourd|1=Gourd}} (瓢箪, hyōtan or hisago).
* {{ill|Hyōtan-tsuka Kofun (Moka)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (真岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-tsuka Kofun (Moka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135579124}} (ひょうたんづかこふん) - A {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} located in {{ill|Mooka, Tochigi|en|Mooka, Tochigi|qid=Q498060|lt=Moka|1=Mooka, Tochigi}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|en|Tochigi Prefecture|qid=Q44843|lt=Tochigi Prefecture|1=Tochigi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Hisago-tsuka Kofun (Ebina)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (海老名市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisago-tsuka Kofun (Ebina)|qq=}} (ひさごづかこふん) - A zenpō-kōen-fun in {{ill|Ebina, Kanagawa|en|Ebina, Kanagawa|qid=Q734390|lt=Ebina|1=Ebina, Kanagawa}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}, part of the {{ill|Kamihamada Kofun Group|ja|上浜田古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamihamada Kofun Group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135579128}}. * {{ill|Hyōtan-tsuka Kofun (Shizuoka)|ja|瓢箪塚古墳 (静岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-tsuka Kofun (Shizuoka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135579132}} (ひょうたんづかこふん) - A zenpō-kōen-fun in {{ill|Shimizu-ku, Shizuoka|en|Shimizu-ku, Shizuoka|qid=Q79385|lt=Shimizu Ward|1=Shimizu-ku, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|Shizuoka (city)|en|Shizuoka (city)|qid=Q174691|lt=Shizuoka City|1=Shizuoka (city)}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}, part of the {{ill|Nishinohara Kofun Group|ja|西ノ原古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishinohara Kofun Group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135579136}}.
== See Also == * [[Hisagotuka Kofun|Hyō-zuka Kofun]] (disambiguation) * [[Hyōtan-yama Kofun]] (disambiguation)
